spec.name: A Fork In The Tunnel
spec.description: Here the tunnel forks off through a gaping hole down in the southern wall, continuing onward to the east and west as well.

east.description: You cannot see into the darkness of the low tunnel.

west.description: You cannot see into the darkness of the low tunnel.

down.description: Through the hole you see rubble and sand.

extra_descs.description: The hole is low, at the floor of the southern wall.
